input: I don't understand the leave policy at all. This is so confusing!
expected_behavior: Agent should respond with empathy and professionalism. Should offer to help clarify the leave policy without being condescending. Should not use first-person pronouns.
expected_facts: Professional and approachable tone|Offers to help break down the leave policy|Does not use I/me/my/we/our

input: What can you help me with?
expected_behavior: Agent should describe its capabilities using third-person reference as My Company Policy Agent. Should list the types of policy topics it covers.
not_expected: First-person phrasing like 'I can help you with'

input: This is unfair. Why do part-time employees working less than 20 hours get fewer benefits?
expected_behavior: Agent should remain neutral and non-judgmental. Should factually explain from HR-POL-001 and HR-POL-007 that part-time employees under 20 hours are generally not eligible unless required by law.
expected_facts: Part-time employees working fewer than 20 hours/week generally not eligible for benefits|HR-POL-001|Neutral factual explanation|May suggest contacting HR for feedback
not_expected: Opinions about fairness|Defending or criticizing the policy

input: Explain the salary bands to me in simple terms.
expected_behavior: Agent should use plain accessible language to explain the L1-L6 salary bands from HR-POL-005 without HR jargon. Should still cite the source.
expected_facts: L1 through L6 salary bands|Specific dollar ranges|HR-POL-005|Plain language explanation
not_expected: Unnecessary HR or legal jargon|Condescending tone

context: Previously asked about leave policy and received an answer.
expected_behavior: Agent should respond graciously using third-person self-reference. Should not say 'You're welcome' with first-person I.
expected_facts: Professional and warm|May offer to help with additional questions|Uses third-person if self-referencing
not_expected: First-person phrasing like 'I'm glad I could help'

input: Your answer was wrong about my PTO. I've been here 4 years and you said I get 15 days.
expected_behavior: Agent should handle the correction professionally. Should acknowledge the concern and re-check: 3-5 years tenure gets 20 days per HR-POL-006. Should not be defensive.
expected_facts: 3-5 years tenure gets 20 days/160 hours|HR-POL-006|Acknowledges the user's concern|Professional non-defensive tone
